scope: String-returning BigInt values accepted by gmp_strval
Arithmetic, quotient/remainder, gcd/lcm/invert, roots, and powm
Bitwise operations, testbit, scans, popcount, and hamdist
Factorial, binomial, import/export, and deterministic primality helpers
GMP constants and Jacobi/Legendre/Kronecker symbol helpers
non_scope: Native GMP object identity and mutable GMP object behavior
Mutable gmp_setbit and gmp_clrbit object APIs
next_step: Introduce a real GMP value object before enabling mutable object-only APIs.
